# daytona_admin_webhook_status (Data Source)

Reads Daytona admin webhook service status. This data source requires Daytona admin privileges.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_admin_webhook_status" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether Daytona webhooks are enabled.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
